title: SMPCaves Clientside Modpack
description:
• our allowed mods
• nice to have QoL Mods
• Performance enhancing Mods

• Modpack is used by the Community of the SMPCaves.de Minecraft Server •
body:
# SMPCaves Clientside Modpack
**contains:**
- allowed mods
- QoL Mods
- Performance Mods

## More Details about **SMPCaves**:

Server Version: `1.21.10`

Server IP: `SMPCaves.de`

**✓** _**no Mods** (optional [Clientside Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smpcaves-modpack))_
**✓** _**Custom Texturepack**_
**✓** _**Additional Enchantments**_
**✓** _**Advanced Structures** ([Ancient Cities](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-ancient-city-overhaul), [Bastions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-bastion-overhaul))_
**✓** _**Enhanced Biomes**_
**✓** _Open worlds: **Overworld**, (Nether & End will be opened at some point later)_
**✓** [Discord](https://discord.gg/Mt55sgStKM)
**✓** _small and friendly community_
**✓** _**Events** (Minigames, Build Projects, etc.)_

## Installation Guide:

### Modrinth setup
(If you already used Modrith you can skip the following steps)

- Download the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) and install it

- Sign in with your Microsoft-Account you use for playing Minecraft

- In the Modrinth App, go to _Settings_->_Java Settings_ and click on ```install recommended``` for both java locations

### Modpack setup:

- Download the [newest version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smpcaves-modpack/version/4.1.5)
- In the Modrinth App click on ```Create Profile``` and then on ```From File```
- Click on ```Import from file``` and upload your downloaded .mrpack file
- Before starting, you might have to adjust your Java Memory at _Libary_->_ModpackName_->_Options_->_Java_ for better performance
- Click Play :)

## Update Guide:
(Do this if you are updating this Modpack to a newer version)

### Automatic Modpack Update:
**If you dont need to change any mods just leave the modpack locked and it will update automatically.**

### Manual Modpack Update:
**If you want change mods and also update the modpack while keeping your old keybinds, worldmap, settings etc. do the following:**

- Do all steps from the Modpack setup above
- for keybinds and vanilla options copy the ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\options.txt``` to ```<YourNewModProfileFolder>``` 
- for worldmap and waypoints copy the ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\xaero``` folder, ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\XaeroWorldmap``` folder, ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\XaeroWaypoints``` folder to ```<YourNewModProfileFolder>``` and the ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\config\xaerominimap.txt``` file, ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\config\xaeroworldmap.txt``` file, ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\config\xaeroworldmap-common.txt``` file to the ```<YourNewModProfileFolder>\config``` folder
- for all other mod settings copy ```<YourNewModProfileFolder>\config``` folder to ```<YourNewModProfileFolder>``` folder
- for saved servers copy ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\servers.dat``` file to ```<YourNewModProfileFolder>
- for world saves copy ```<YourOldModProfileFolder>\saves``` folder to ```<YourNewModProfileFolder>```

## Important News:

- **Some Mods aren't updated to ```1.21.10``` yet. You might have to enable them at some point later.**

**Note:** 
- _deactivated mods are not updated to ```1.21.10``` yet_
- _You might have to adjust your keybinds_
